875746969.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0300

892381454.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_multi_talk1_B_3

909580480.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_7_B

918333386.transcript: They had front row seats to the wonderful world of pain!

jp.text: ああ！このまま押し切ろう！

926667557.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1100
926667557.transcript: My pups really respect you, you know.

jp.text: この子たちもジークフリートを尊敬しているようだ。

932119411.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1300
932119411.transcript: You work magic with the sword!

jp.text: まだ油断しちゃダメだ！

jp.text: ペットのみんなも前と違ってやる気みたいだ

947028938.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1500

947137910.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1200
947137910.transcript: Heh, should we start a band?

948384378.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_FIRST

jp.text: よし！このまま押し切ろう！みんな！

949476250.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_2_B
949476250.transcript: Show it how far we've come!

952283794.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL1900

jp.text: 心強いだろ？次も任せてくれ
jp.literal: You're feeling confident, huh? Leave the next one to me.

jp.text: イド。本当にオマエなのか。
jp.literal: Id? Could it really be you...?

955535832.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_7st_6_B
955535832.transcript: We can't let its powers take hold!

jp.text: 私たちで食い止めるんだ！

961241193.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_normal_2st_1_C
961241193.transcript: Behave! Or you'll eat my whip!

jp.text: 悪い子には容赦しないぞ！

970429521.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL1000
970429521.transcript: My pack and I are devoted to each other.

jp.text: まだまだこんなものじゃないぞ！

975119348.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL1500
975119348.transcript: You did all that with your bare hands?

jp.text: とても素手とは思えないな
jp.literal: I can't believe you're so reckless.

975670812.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_B_PL0300
975670812.transcript: My pack's taken a shine to you.

jp.text: ああ、この子たちはラカムになついているからな。
jp.literal: Ah, these kids are really fond of Rackam.

jp.text: この程度ならお安い御用だ

978195932.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0200
978195932.transcript: You were amazing as well, Catalina!

jp.text: それはお互いさまだろ？
jp.literal: That's what you get for helping me out.

982756205.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_A_PL0300
982756205.transcript: Having your midlife crisis already? Wow, Rackam!

jp.text: 張り合うつもりなら受けて立つぞ
jp.literal: If you're gonna go all out, I'll take it head on.

983146489.label: PL0700_vo_CMM_emo_pose_4
983146489.transcript: So... who's ready for a walk?

jp.text: その武器、重くないのか？

985568748.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_5_FIRST
985568748.transcript: There it is! Now let's bust it open!

jp.text: 見えたな！あとは叩くだけだ！
jp.literal: I see it now. Just gotta hit it!

985736501.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_A_PL1200
985736501.transcript: Looks like Fuji wants to be your best friend!

jp.text: シャルロッテはフージーたちと仲良くやれそうだな
jp.literal: Charlotta seems like she'd get along with the Fujis.

993505179.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_6st_4_B
993505179.transcript: That's more like it! Let's finish this!

jp.text: よし！この調子だ！決着をつける！
謝るなら今のうちだぞ
jp.literal: You'd better apologize while you still can!

998615660.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_C_PL1900
998615660.transcript: Aww, don't be scared of that big pineapple.

jp.text: みんな、ああ見えてイドはいいやつだぞ。

1001172385.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk2_C_PL0200
1001172385.transcript: Let's set up a playdate after this is all over!

jp.text: いいぞ。あとでたくさん遊んでやってくれ。
jp.literal: Alright! Let's have a lot of fun later!

1003896110.label: PL0700_vo_NAV_throw_spear_reaction_1
1003896110.transcript: Get a taste of your own medicine!

1004902355.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_talk1_B_PL0200

すごいじゃないか、カリオストロ！

jp.text: こうなったら、とことんまでだ！

1016769022.transcript: Right! We'll look out for any strong attacks!

1033445238.transcript: I don't like that gleam in your eye.

1041450837.transcript: Hear that, Fujin? You're such a good boy!

ギャアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアアア
これがチームワークだ！

1045325491.label: PL0700_vo_SP_link_ms_boss_4st_4_C
1045325491.transcript: Let's take it slowly. One step at a time.
